problems_encountered.description: HTTP 403 error when getting project membership details for ID 6572f85e-4c01-4178-8781-7cc1b1db16d5. API returned 'Unexpected response status (expected 200, got: 403)'

tool_response_summary: Failed to get project membership details due to 403 permission denied error
execution_notes: Tool executed with real membership ID from fixtures but returned permission error. This suggests the OAuth token lacks necessary permissions for membership operations.
